All Blogs / 13 Best Staffing Agency Software in 2026 13 Best Staffing Agency Software in 2026 Sagrika Jain | January 12, 2026 | 12 Min read Are you looking to invest in staffing agency software but unsure which one best suits your recruiting business? We’ve got you covered! Discover the best software for staffing agencies with their ratings, pricing, and free trial information. What is Staffing agency software? Staffing agency software is the cornerstone of a well-oiled staffing machine. This software helps agencies manage their workforce and clients like a well-tuned piano. With features like candidate tracking, client management, job posting, resume management, time tracking, billing and invoicing, and reporting, staffing agency software acts as the conductor, bringing harmony to the recruitment process. Best Staffing Agency Software Various types of staffing agency software are available on the market. These software solutions are designed to streamline and automate the processes involved in managing a staffing agency. Here are some common types of staffing agency software 1. Recruiterflow Recruiterflow’s ATS & CRM Rated 4.8/5 on Capterra. Recruiterflow is an AI-native recruiting system built for retained, contingent, and executive search firms. Unlike most platforms that bolt AI onto a legacy core, Recruiterflow was designed with AI at the centre — through AIRA, an intelligence layer that runs across sourcing, outreach, matching, and pipeline management automatically. Pricing: $119/user/month Best for: Retained, contingent, and executive search firms of all sizes — from boutique firms to global operations. Key capabilities: AI candidate matching, context capture, and next-action surfacing via AIRA Multi-channel sequences across email, LinkedIn, SMS, and calls Client portal, deal pipeline, and collaborative hiring in one system “With Bullhorn, you have to bolt something on and manage a separate vendor relationship. Recruiterflow had everything integrated.” — Chris Leuzze, FloodGate Outcomes: 676% more job orders (Believe Resourcing) · 2× placements (PAC Solutions) · 40% more submittals (Guy Last Recruitment) Also, check – How to Reduce the Time to Fill with Recruitment CRM. 2. Bullhorn G2 Rating: 4.0/5 Capterra Rating: 4.1/5 Free Trial: Not available. Pricing: Available upon request. Bullhorn ATS is a cloud-based recruiting software that enables staffing agencies to increase sales, streamline operations, and expedite recruitment. Its ATS displays all the necessary information about the candidates in one place, making it easy for you to connect with candidates. Its advanced analytics features track your recruiting activities and transform them into actionable business insights with configurable reports tailored to your goals and KPIs. Also Read: 11 Best software for recruitment agencies Onboarding Software for staffing agencies 3. Workbright G2 Rating: 4.8/5 Capterra Rating: 4.8/5 Free Trial: Not Available. Pricing: Available upon request. Workbright is a cloud-based HR software designed for staffing agencies. The platform streamlines HR processes and provides real-time data and reporting capabilities, enabling staffing agencies to make informed decisions about their workforce. Workbright offers a range of features, including onboarding, time tracking, employee document management, and compliance reporting. The software also integrates with existing HR and payroll systems, ensuring that data is easily accessible and up-to-date. The benefits of using Workbright for staffing agencies include increased efficiency, improved data accuracy, and streamlined HR processes. Workbright provides staffing agencies with the tools they need to manage their workforce effectively and ensure compliance with HR regulations. By using Workbright, staffing agencies can focus on sourcing and placing top talent, while freeing up valuable time and resources to invest in other key areas of their business. Also Read: Best Executive Search Software 4. BambooHR G2 Rating: 4.5/5 Capterra Rating: 4.6/5 Free Trial: Available. Pricing: Available upon request. BambooHR is a cloud-based HR software that helps staffing agencies streamline their HR processes and manage their workforce efficiently. With its user-friendly interface and robust features, BambooHR simplifies HR tasks such as onboarding, tracking time-off requests, and storing employee information. The software also offers robust reporting capabilities, allowing staffing agencies to easily generate reports on key HR metrics, such as headcount and turnover. Additionally, BambooHR integrates with other HR and payroll systems, allowing for seamless data transfer and reducing manual data entry. The benefits of using BambooHR for staffing agencies include increased productivity, improved data accuracy, and enhanced compliance with HR regulations. With BambooHR, staffing agencies can focus on what they do best – sourcing and placing top talent – while streamlining their HR operations.Also, check out our blog on the Top 10 Best Enterprise Recruitment Software. Also Read: Best onboarding software for staffing agencies Background check software for staffing agencies 5. Checkr G2 Rating: 4.5/5 Capterra Rating: 4.7/5 Free Trial: Available. Pricing: Plans start from $29.99/check. Checkr is a cutting-edge software designed to streamline and automate the quality assurance process for various industries. The software’s user-friendly platform provides a centralized location for teams to manage and track quality assurance tasks, from inspection to reporting. With Checkr, teams can easily create and manage checklists, track completion status, and generate real-time reports to track progress and identify areas for improvement. The software’s advanced analytics capabilities also provide valuable insights into the quality assurance process, helping teams make data-driven decisions to improve their processes. Checkr’s mobile app makes it easy for teams to conduct inspections and checklists on the go, ensuring that no detail is missed. With Checkr, teams can streamline their quality assurance processes, make more informed decisions, and provide a better experience for their customers. You can also explore our detailed guide on the Staffing Agency Contract Template to simplify your contract management and get free downloadable templates! 6.GoodHire G2 Rating: 4.6/5 Capterra Rating: 4.8/5 Free Trial: Not Available. Pricing: Plans start from $29.99/check. GoodHire is a leading background check and employment verification software designed to help staffing agencies make informed hiring decisions. The software’s user-friendly platform provides access to a variety of background check services, including criminal history, employment verification, and education verification. With GoodHire, staffing agencies can easily and securely order and receive background check results in a timely manner, reducing the time and effort required for the recruitment process. GoodHire’s real-time reporting capabilities also provide staffing agencies with valuable insights into the results of each background check, helping them make informed hiring decisions. The software’s compliance with various regulations and standards, such as the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA), ensures that staffing agencies are making hiring decisions in a legal and ethical manner. With GoodHire, staffing agencies can streamline their recruitment process, make more informed hiring decisions, and ensure compliance with relevant regulations and standards. Check out our detailed on blog best background check software Skill assessment software for staffing agencies 7. Harver G2 Rating: 4.6/5 Capterra Rating: 5.0/5 Free Trial: Not mentioned on the website. Pricing: Available on request. Harver is a candidate selection platform designed to assist staffing agencies in determining the suitability of potential hires for specific job roles. By combining data and science, Harver uses a proprietary algorithm to assess a candidate’s cognitive abilities, aptitudes, and soft skills through pre-employment assessments. This provides recruiters with a score they can use to make informed hiring decisions. Harver allows staffing agencies to implement industry-specific situational judgment tests to evaluate the candidate’s fit for a particular industry. The platform reduces the potential for unconscious bias and streamlines the hiring process by providing a more efficient way to screen candidates through its one-way video interview system. Harver is ideal for staffing agencies seeking to enhance their hiring process with faster screening, improved candidate matching, and increased accuracy in predicting job fit. The platform is also used by industries such as retail, contact centers, hospitality, and tech to aid in their hiring decisions. 8. iMocha G2 Rating: 4.4/5 Capterra Rating: 4.5/5 Free Trial: Available. Pricing: Available on request. iMocha is a cutting-edge software designed to streamline and enhance the assessment and recruitment process. With its user-friendly interface, iMocha makes it easy for recruiters to assess candidates’ skills and knowledge in a variety of areas, including coding, data analysis, and language proficiency. The software’s real-time analytics and reporting capabilities give recruiters insight into the performance of each candidate, helping them make informed hiring decisions. Additionally, iMocha’s automation tools significantly reduce the time and effort required for the recruitment process, freeing up recruiters to focus on other important tasks. The software’s compatibility with a wide range of platforms and devices makes it an ideal solution for recruiters who need to assess candidates remotely. With iMocha, recruiters can streamline their recruitment process, make more informed hiring decisions, and ultimately save time and resources. Also read: 25 Best Talent Assessment Tools for Recruiters Finance management tools for staffing agencies 9. Paylocity G2 Rating: 4.4/5 Capterra Rating: 4.9/5 Free Trial: Not Available. Pricing: Available upon request. Paylocity is a comprehensive human capital management software designed to streamline and simplify payroll, HR, and benefits processes. With Paylocity, staffing agencies can easily manage employee information, run payroll, and offer a variety of benefits. The software’s intuitive interface and automation tools make it simple for staffing agencies to stay compliant with payroll taxes and other regulations. In addition, Paylocity provides real-time reporting and analytics capabilities, giving staffing agencies valuable insights into their payroll and HR processes. This allows staffing agencies to make data-driven decisions about their workforce. Paylocity’s mobile app also makes it easy for employees to access their pay stubs, benefits information, and time off requests from anywhere, at any time. With Paylocity, staffing agencies can streamline their payroll and HR processes, enhance their ability to make data-driven decisions, and provide their employees with a convenient and user-friendly experience. Learn more about the best accounting practice management software here, for more finance management tool alternatives. 10. Rippling G2 Rating: 4.8/5 Capterra Rating: 4.9/5 Free Trial: Not Available. Pricing: Available upon request. Rippling is a comprehensive HR, payroll, and benefits platform designed to streamline and automate various HR and payroll processes. With Rippling, staffing agencies can easily manage employee information, run payroll, offer benefits, and handle various HR tasks, all from one central location. The software’s intuitive interface and automation tools make it simple for staffing agencies to stay compliant with payroll taxes and other regulations, and its real-time analytics capabilities provide valuable insights into HR and payroll processes. Rippling also offers a variety of integrations with other HR and payroll systems, making it an ideal solution for businesses of all sizes. The platform’s mobile app makes it easy for employees to access their pay stubs, benefits information, and other HR-related information from anywhere, at any time. With Rippling, staffing agencies can streamline their HR and payroll processes, enhance their ability to make data-driven decisions, and provide their employees with a convenient and user-friendly experience. Timesheet Software for staffing agencies 11. TimeDoctor G2 Rating: 4.4/5 Capterra Rating: 4.5/5 Free Trial: Available. Pricing: Plans start from $5.9/user/month Time Doctor is a comprehensive time-tracking and productivity software designed to help individuals and teams stay on task and achieve their goals. The software’s user-friendly platform provides real-time tracking of time spent on various tasks and projects, helping individuals and teams to prioritize their work and focus on the most important tasks. Time Doctor also offers a variety of productivity tools, including task management and scheduling features, to help individuals and teams stay organized and on track. The software’s advanced reporting capabilities provide valuable insights into time spent on various tasks, helping individuals and teams to identify areas for improvement and increase their productivity. Time Doctor’s compatibility with a wide range of platforms and devices makes it an ideal solution for individuals and teams who need to track their time and productivity on the go. With Time Doctor, individuals and teams can streamline their work processes, increase their productivity, and achieve their goals. 12. Hivedesk G2 Rating: 4.4/5 Capterra Rating: 4.4/5 Free Trial: Available. Pricing: Plans start from $25/month. HiveDesk is a powerful project management and time-tracking software designed for staffing agencies. The software’s user-friendly platform provides a centralized location for teams to manage projects, track time spent on tasks, and collaborate with each other. With HiveDesk, staffing agencies can easily manage multiple projects and clients, allocate resources, and monitor project progress in real time. The software’s advanced reporting capabilities provide valuable insights into project performance, helping staffing agencies make data-driven decisions to improve their processes. HiveDesk’s time tracking features also ensure that staffing agencies are accurately tracking the time spent on each project, helping them to accurately invoice their clients and avoid disputes. The software’s compatibility with a wide range of platforms and devices makes it an ideal solution for staffing agencies who need to manage projects and track time on the go. With HiveDesk, staffing agencies can streamline their project management processes, increase their productivity, and provide their clients with accurate and timely invoices. Take a glance at the Best Timesheet Software for Recruitment Agencies Scheduling software for staffing agencies Staff Scheduling Software is a highly efficient platform that simplifies scheduling temporary staff with just a few clicks. Managing job schedules and labor allocation can be time-consuming and prone to mistakes, potentially damaging a staffing agency’s reputation. Using a dependable staff scheduling solution, you can shift the workload away from scheduling and focus on connecting the ideal candidates with the best job opportunities. 13. Zoho Workerly G2 Rating: 4.5/5 Capterra Rating: 4.4/5 Free Trial: Available. Pricing: Plans start from $45.65/month. With Zoho Workerly’s employee scheduling software, staffing agencies gain access to a comprehensive platform that allows seamless management of client and temporary worker databases. This user-friendly system enables agencies to schedule jobs based on specific client requirements, effortlessly generate timesheets, and efficiently handle invoicing, all within a unified interface. FAQs What Software Do Staffing Agencies Use? Staffing agencies commonly use Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) to track candidate activity and Customer Relationship Management (CRM). Some staffing agencies also use candidate assessment tools, video interviewing platforms, payroll systems, and many more to manage their staffing processes. What is the Best Software for Staffing Agencies? Considering your recruiting requirements, staffing agencies can seek reviews on sites like G2, Capterra, and TrustRadius to choose the right software. If you are looking for an all-encompassing platform that provides tools for every recruitment phase, RecruiterFlow is worth checking out. Which is the best recruitment software for a small business? Recruiterflow is the best recruitment software for small businesses as it has a seamless onboarding and the best customer support team. Click here to know why our customers love us. How to promote jobs with RecruiterFlow? RecruiterFlow offers over 25 job board integrations, including LinkedIn, Indeed, and many more. All you have to do is create the job post, and RecruiterFlow will ensure it’s posted on leading platforms and catches the attention of relevant candidates. Is RecruiterFlow GDPR compliant? Recruiterflow, as a service provider, is and always will be 100% GDPR compliant. So your data is in safe hands.
